things.name: Perovskites
things.description: Materials with an ABX3 type structure where cation 'A' occupies corner positions, cation 'B' is at the center, and anion 'X' is at the faces. They can be classified as conductors, insulators/dielectrics, or semiconductors (band gap < 3eV), and by symmetry (centrosymmetric, asymmetric, non-centrosymmetric).
